calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Herbert Donalson, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger
Terrance C. Heath, Esq. for Petitioner Lorne Gene Harris, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Lorne Edward Harris.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-26-2003 Reset To Jul-03-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, CSR: David Davemport, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo.
Lorne Gene Harris, Esq. for Petitioner Lorne Gene Harris who was not present.
The matter is continued to July 3, 2003 for petitioner to appear in court.
